final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original editorial-style social media cover image (小红书 cover) announcing GPT-image-2's launch on the Lovart platform.

Style/medium: needs a high-end magazine editorial aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must use diagonal composition
Subject: must include the launch announcement of GPT-image-2 on Lovart as the focal concept
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a high-contrast atmosphere with strong accent emphasis — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a high-contrast direction with strong accent color — exact hues and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-image-2" and "Lovart"
Constraints: must preserve both brand names verbatim and legible; diagonal composition must be visually dominant
Avoid:
